evals.prompt: Create an ASCII cover for the testing-feedback-loop-agenti-ai article
evals.expected_output: A React component at src/components/covers/testing-feedback-loop-agenti-ai.tsx showing test runner output with pass/fail indicators and a feedback loop visual. Uses text-chart-2 for passes, text-chart-5 for failures, text-primary for structure.

evals.prompt: Generate the ASCII art card cover for the article about multi-model orchestration with GitHub Copilot CLI
evals.expected_output: A React component at src/components/covers/multi-modello-copilot-cli-orchestrazione.tsx showing connected model nodes or a network/orchestration diagram. Uses multiple chart colors for different model nodes, text-primary for connections.

evals.prompt: Make an ascii cover for the cli-vs-ide-agenti-ai article
evals.expected_output: A React component at src/components/covers/cli-vs-ide-agenti-ai.tsx showing a side-by-side comparison of a terminal window and an IDE window. Uses contrasting chart colors for each side, text-primary for borders.
